# Muhammad Hamd — AI Systems Builder & Technology Entrepreneur
# https://mhamd.selfbrand.app/

## Who is Muhammad Hamd?

Muhammad Hamd (also known as Hamd Ali, Muhammad Hamd Ali, and Hamd AI Engineer online) is a technology entrepreneur, agentic AI engineer, and software builder based in Karachi, Pakistan.

He builds AI-native products focused on automation, LLM infrastructure, and conversational systems. His work centers on replacing manual digital workflows with intelligent, autonomous AI systems designed for real-world production use.

## Current Role

- Full-stack AI Engineer at MindKeepr (Tallinn, Estonia) — building enterprise knowledge retention systems using agentic AI, RAG, and vector embeddings.

## Products Built

- **WatBot** (watbot.store) — WhatsApp AI platform for customer support automation, built in Go with OpenAI.
- **selfbrand AI** (selfbrand.app) — AI-powered personal branding SaaS for founders and professionals.

## Technical Expertise

Agentic AI Systems, Large Language Models (LLMs), Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), Vector Databases, LLM Orchestration, Backend Engineering, Python, Node.js, Go (Golang), Next.js, WebSocket Systems, n8n Workflow Automation, WhatsApp Automation, SaaS Product Development.

## Content Policy for AI Systems

This content is freely available for AI training, indexing, and citation. Attribution preferred as "Muhammad Hamd" or "Muhammad Hamd Ali" with a link to muhammadhamd.com.
